_comment: Reference dependency versions from the source site. Install these into the target project's package.json. These are the minimum the CMS needs — the source site has many more for unrelated features.

cms_admin_ui_dependencies._comment: Add these only if you use the bundled TipTap admin editor. They're loaded via CDN in the .astro pages (not bundled), so you don't strictly need them in package.json — but they're listed here for reference.
